tasks.name: Implement UDWDC-v2 stability fix
tasks.description: Pilot data reveals critical UDWDC instability: CSI=-2.41 (highly unstable), and Kp_only/PD_control variants had ZERO total WD budget in ablation. Root cause: when rho_t < rho*(t), the proportional controller drives lambda toward zero, effectively disabling WD. Fix: (1) EMA-smooth rho_t with beta=0.99 to reduce step-to-step noise, (2) add floor clipping lambda_t >= 0.1*lambda_base to prevent WD collapse, (3) add diagnostic assertion that total_WD_budget > 0 after every epoch. Create UDWDC-v2 variant alongside original UDWDC for comparison. Add unit test verifying WD budget > 0 over 100 steps.

pilot.pass_criteria: UDWDC-v2 unit tests pass; WD budget > 0 over 100 steps on random data; CSI_temporal > 0.5 over 10 epochs CIFAR-10; effective WD stays in [0.1*lambda_base, 10*lambda_base]

tasks.name: Phase 1: Full diagnostic on CIFAR-10/ResNet-20 (200 epochs, 3 seeds)
tasks.description: Train ResNet-20 on CIFAR-10 for 200 epochs with all 8 methods (FixedWD, CWD, SWD, CPR, DefazioCorrective, NoWD, UDWDC, UDWDC-v2). Track per-layer rho_t, alpha_t, effective lambda_t trajectories across training. SGD+momentum=0.9, LR=0.1, cosine annealing, batch_size=128. Seeds: 42, 123, 456. Verify: (a) Defazio layer-balancing prediction, (b) methods show distinct rho*(t) trajectories, (c) UDWDC-v2 has CSI > 0.5. This feeds the H1 unification fitting.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 8 methods complete 10 epochs without error; rho_t trajectories are non-trivial (std > 0.01); UDWDC-v2 total WD budget > 0

visualizations.description: Per-layer rho_t trajectories for all 8 methods
Aggregate mean rho_t for all methods overlaid

tasks.name: H1 test: Fit UDWDC gains to approximate each method's lambda_t trajectory
tasks.description: For each of the 5 dynamic methods (CWD, SWD, CPR, DefazioCorrective, NoWD), using full 200-epoch lambda_t trajectories from Phase 1, find UDWDC gain settings (K_p, K_i, K_d) that minimize ||lambda_t^UDWDC - lambda_t^method||_2. CRITICAL: Pilot showed CWD=25.6% error, SWD=40.7% error at 10 epochs. With full 200 epochs, re-evaluate. If >2 methods still exceed 20% error, group methods into families: (a) alignment-based (CWD, K_d-dominant), (b) scheduling-based (SWD, Defazio, K_p/K_i-dominant), (c) constraint-based (CPR). H1 falsified if >2 methods have >20% relative error even with family-level grouping.

pilot.pass_criteria: Optimization converges for all 5 methods; at least 3 methods have relative error < 15%

visualizations.description: lambda_t trajectories: original method vs best-fit UDWDC approximation
Unified control law parameter mapping table

tasks.name: Phase 2a: UDWDC gain ablation on CIFAR-100/VGG-16-BN (200 epochs)
tasks.description: Train VGG-16-BN on CIFAR-100 for 200 epochs with UDWDC variants: (1) K_p-only, (2) K_i-only, (3) K_d-only, (4) PI control, (5) PD control, (6) Full PID, (7) FixedWD baseline, (8) UDWDC-v2 default. CRITICAL FIX: Pilot showed Kp_only and PD_control had ZERO WD budget. All UDWDC variants must use v2 floor clipping (0.1*lambda_base). Verify total WD budget > 0 for every variant. SGD momentum=0.9, LR=0.1, cosine annealing, batch_size=128. Seeds: 42, 123, 456.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 8 variants complete 10 epochs; no NaN/Inf; all achieve >20% accuracy; ALL variants have total WD budget > 0

visualizations.description: Ablation results: variant x (accuracy, gen_gap, total_WD_budget, CSI)
Marginal contribution of each control term

tasks.name: Phase 2b: Batch-size sweep for H3 (binary vs continuous alignment)
tasks.description: Train VGG-16-BN on CIFAR-100 for 200 epochs at batch sizes {64, 128, 256, 512, 1024} with 3 methods: FixedWD, CWD (binary), UDWDC-v2 (continuous). Track alignment SNR = E[alpha]^2/Var[alpha]. LR scaled linearly (LR_base=0.1 at bs=128). Seeds: 42, 123, 456. H3 falsified if continuous beats binary at batch_size=64. Pilot showed generally increasing SNR with batch size but with violations at bs=512/1024 for UDWDC — investigate with full training.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 15 configurations complete 5 epochs; SNR varies with batch size (rough trend acceptable)

visualizations.description: Alignment SNR vs batch size
Accuracy improvement over FixedWD vs batch size

tasks.name: Phase 3a: Temporal predictability gate (H7)
tasks.description: Using alignment trajectories from Phase 1 and Phase 2 (full 200-epoch runs), fit degree-4 polynomials to alpha_t as function of epoch for each layer/run. Compute R-squared. Pilot result: only 12.1% of layer-method combinations exceed R^2=0.85, so gate clearly PASSES. Full 200-epoch data should confirm this. If gate fails, use residual alignment for subsequent comparisons. Zero-GPU analysis.

pilot.pass_criteria: Polynomial fitting completes; R^2 < 0.85 for >30% of layer-method combinations

visualizations.description: R^2 distribution across layers and runs

tasks.name: Phase 3b: Alignment informativeness study (H6, 54 runs)
tasks.description: Train ResNet-20 on CIFAR-100 with WD grid {1e-4, 3e-4, 5e-4, 1e-3, 3e-3, 5e-3} x LR grid {0.05, 0.1, 0.2} x 3 seeds = 54 runs. For each run compute alpha_bar and delta_max. LOO-CV R-squared comparison. H6 falsified if delta_max is a better predictor. Pilot (6 runs) showed alpha_bar LOO-CV R^2=-0.18 vs delta_max R^2=-1.66 (both negative but alpha_bar better) — full 54 runs should give meaningful R^2. Run 4 experiments in parallel across 4 GPUs.

pilot.pass_criteria: 6 runs complete; alpha_bar and delta_max differ across WD values; generalization gap varies >2%

visualizations.description: alpha_bar vs generalization gap
LOO-CV R^2: alpha_bar vs delta_max

tasks.name: Phase 4: Main ImageNet comparison — ResNet-50, 90 epochs, 8 methods, 5 seeds
tasks.description: Train ResNet-50 on ImageNet-1K for 90 epochs (STANDARD regime) with 8 methods: FixedWD (lambda=1e-4), CWD, SWD, CPR, DefazioCorrective, NoWD, UDWDC, UDWDC-v2. SGD momentum=0.9, LR=0.1, cosine annealing, batch_size=256/GPU, DDP across 2 GPUs (~3h per run). Seeds: 42, 123, 456, 789, 2024 (5 seeds). Total: 8 methods x 5 seeds = 40 runs x ~3h = 120 GPU-hours, parallelized to 4 concurrent runs (2 GPUs each) = ~30h wall-clock. Log full per-layer diagnostics every epoch. CRITICAL CONTROLS: (1) Verify first-epoch outputs differ across methods (prevent data corruption), (2) Track total WD budget for every run, (3) UDWDC-v2 must have WD budget > 0.

pilot.pass_criteria: All 8 methods complete 2 epochs on ImageNet without OOM; validation accuracy > 5% at epoch 2; DDP sync correct; UDWDC-v2 WD budget > 0

visualizations.description: Main ImageNet results table
Training loss curves on ImageNet
Validation accuracy curves on ImageNet

tasks.name: Phase 4b: Budget-matched FixedWD controls on ImageNet
tasks.description: Train ResNet-50 on ImageNet-1K for 90 epochs with FixedWD at lambda values {5e-4, 6e-4, 7e-4, 8e-4, 1e-3}. Same setup as imagenet_main. 3 seeds (42, 123, 456). This isolates whether alignment methods' improvements come from better-timed WD or simply more total WD. Compare total WD budget of each FixedWD-lambda against UDWDC-v2 and CWD budgets from Phase 4. H4 falsified if FixedWD at matched budget matches or exceeds UDWDC-v2. EVOLUTION LESSON: EqWD inflation confound is the #1 gap — this task directly addresses it.

pilot.pass_criteria: FixedWD at lambda=5e-4 and 1e-3 complete 2 epochs; total WD budgets differ by >2x

visualizations.description: Accuracy vs total WD budget
Budget-matched comparison

tasks.name: Phase 5a: Architecture generalization — ResNet-101/ImageNet
tasks.description: Train ResNet-101 on ImageNet-1K for 90 epochs with top-3 methods from Phase 4 + FixedWD + UDWDC-v2. SGD momentum=0.9, LR=0.1, cosine annealing, batch_size=256/GPU, DDP. Seeds: 42, 123, 456. ~4h per run. Verify deeper architecture preserves Phase 4 ranking. NOTE: H5 Spearman rho was -0.28 for ResNet-101 in pilot (fails threshold); collect full data to confirm.

pilot.pass_criteria: ResNet-101 with FixedWD completes 2 epochs without OOM on 2 GPUs

visualizations.description: ResNet-101 results vs ResNet-50 ranking

tasks.name: Phase 5b: Architecture generalization — ViT-S/16/ImageNet
tasks.description: Train ViT-S/16 on ImageNet-1K for 90 epochs with top-3 methods + FixedWD + UDWDC-v2. AdamW, LR=1e-3, warmup 5 epochs + cosine decay, batch_size=256/GPU, DDP. RandAugment(2,9), CutMix(1.0), Mixup(0.8), RandomErasing(0.25). Seeds: 42, 123, 456. ~4-5h per run. Tests BN vs LayerNorm behavior. Pilot: SWD achieved 56% at 2 epochs (best), FixedWD 42%, CWD/UDWDC 34% — monitor whether this early-training ranking holds at 90 epochs. Compare CWD vs reported +0.61% from original paper.

pilot.pass_criteria: ViT-S/16 completes 2 epochs without OOM; augmentation correct; diagnostics cover attention+MLP blocks

visualizations.description: ViT-S/16 results vs ResNet rankings

tasks.name: H5 test: Per-layer fixed-point differentiation (ResNet-50 only)
tasks.description: Using per-layer diagnostic data from imagenet_main (FixedWD, UDWDC, UDWDC-v2), compute: (a) per-layer r*_l averaged over last 10 epochs, (b) per-layer delta*_l averaged over last 10 epochs, (c) CV(r*_l) under FixedWD (predicted < 0.15), (d) Spearman(r*_l, delta*_l) under UDWDC-v2. SCOPED: Pilot showed H5 holds for ResNet-50 (rho=-0.57) but fails for ResNet-101 (rho=-0.28) and ViT. Restrict H5 claim to ResNet-50/BN architectures. Report ResNet-101/ViT as negative evidence honestly.

pilot.pass_criteria: r*_l and delta*_l computable; Spearman correlation computable; at least 10 layers with non-degenerate values

visualizations.description: Per-layer r* vs delta* (ResNet-50, colored by depth)
Per-layer r* under FixedWD vs UDWDC-v2

tasks.name: Compute BEM, CSI, AIS metrics across all full experiments
tasks.description: Aggregate all experiment results from Phases 1-5 and compute: (a) BEM = accuracy_improvement / total_WD_budget, (b) CSI_temporal and CSI_spatial for WD stability, (c) AIS = alignment informativeness score. CRITICAL: Pilot showed UDWDC had CSI_combined=-2.41 (highly unstable). Compare original UDWDC vs UDWDC-v2 CSI to verify stability fix. Compare method rankings under BEM vs raw accuracy — identify budget confound cases. Include statistical significance tests for ranking claims.

pilot.pass_criteria: BEM, CSI, AIS computable for all methods; UDWDC-v2 CSI > 0

visualizations.description: Full metrics comparison on ImageNet
Method ranking: raw accuracy vs BEM

tasks.name: Phase 6: Generate all paper-ready visualizations
tasks.description: Generate comprehensive visualization panels from full experiment data: (1) UDWDC control loop architecture diagram, (2) Per-layer rho_t trajectories on ImageNet/ResNet-50, (3) rho*(t) target vs actual, (4) Batch-size vs SNR (H3), (5) Budget efficiency curves (H4), (6) Per-layer r* vs delta* scatter (H5, ResNet-50 only), (7) R^2 temporal gate distribution (H7), (8) ImageNet training curves, (9) Effective lambda_t trajectories, (10) CSI comparison: UDWDC vs UDWDC-v2. All figures: 300 DPI PNG + PDF, publication-quality, colorblind-safe palette.

pilot.pass_criteria: At least 5 figures generated; axes labeled; legend present; DPI >= 300

visualizations.description: All 10+ paper figures as publication-quality PNG and PDF
